Report Ad
Raleigh dbt Meetup

Hosted by Savannah C. and Bolaji

Raleigh dbt Meetup
5.0
6 reviews
Details

What are dbt meetups? dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🤝Organizer: dbt Labs Community Team (Emceed by Bolaji Oyejide, Community Team)
🏠Venue Host: Fullsteam @ Boxyard RTP. Fullsteam Brewery is the specific business hosting us. They have 2 floors. Their 2nd floor is the private rental space, called Top Box. That's where we'll be!
🍕Catering: light refreshments will be provided

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation:** https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📝Agenda

5:30 - 6:00 | Check in/Registration (30 min)
6:00 - 6:05 | Welcome Remarks by dbt Labs (5 min)
6:05 - 6:35 | Presentation by Savannah Chunn-Allnutt (dbt Labs) on the Power of CI/CD in Data Transformation (30 min)
6:35 - 6:45 | Presentation Q&A (10 min)
6:45 - 6:50 | Closing Remarks by dbt Labs + call for speakers, host, and organizers for next time... let's keep this going! (5 min)
6:50 - 8:00 | Networking & Reception

🗣️Presentation Topic: The power of CI/CD in data transformation
Description: Join us for a chat about the power of CI/CD in data transformation! We’ll walk through the journey of incorporating a dbt CI job and Advanced CI insight into your development flow to minimize bugs found in production. Wouldn’t we all benefit from a life with less hot fixes?

EVENT DETAILS:
Food and refreshments will be provided.
🚗 Free parking: There is a very large parking lot at Boxyard RTP and it is complimentary.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-raleigh channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

***

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Savannah Chunn-Allnutt

Savannah Chunn-Allnutt is a Solutions Architect at dbt Labs based in North Carolina. Savannah is a self-described data nerd who loves to explore new ways to make businesses more efficient and successful through improved data techniques.
